productDisplayName: Puma Men big cat Black Wallets
description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from puma. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Product Details Made of synthetic fabric withheat transferred Puma Jumping cat on the outer and Puma badge on the innerTwo main chambers for keeping cashFour small convenient chambers to hold cards One zippered compartment to hold coinsCareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
